page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal server instance managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance integrates eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 160 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external block storage solutions for persistent data.

The hardware profile offers high resource density for parallel processing workloads. The absence of local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring network-attached storage configurations which may impact I/O latency compared to local NVMe options. This server is designed for GPU-accelerated workloads, machine learning inference, distributed graphics rendering, and high-performance computing tasks that leverage multi-GPU configurations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 bare-metal server instance designed for parallel processing and GPU-accelerated workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features 128 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of system memory. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. Network connectivity is supported by a 160 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all data persistence must be managed via network-attached storage. The high GPU density and dedicated CPU allocation make this configuration suitable for machine learning inference, distributed rendering, and compute-heavy scientific simulations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is an x86_64 bare-metal server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 192 GB VRAM, and 160 Gbps network bandwidth.

tagline: A dedicated bare-metal instance featuring eight graphics processors, high-speed networking, and one hundred twenty-eight physical processor cores for parallel computing.

Eight integrated NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM
512.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB allocated per core
160 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
